name: Baby Care Mommay Game
description: Welcome to Mommy & dads newborn baby nursery care babysitter game for girls and kids. Grand parents, mommy and daddy are waiting for their newborn baby coming to first day at home. Welcome to this free mommy maternity and pregnancy checkup game for pregnant mothers. Play this free maternity nursery game and improve your parenting skills. Grand mother and Grand father are waiting for their grandson to arrive soon at home. Play with this virtual talkative baby in babysitter. Let’s dress Up your talking baby with amazing dresses, caps, glasses and lot of toys in newborn baby home. Are you waiting for your baby gender? Ohh, It is baby boy.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
